settings.question: What is GlamourBeauty's return policy?
settings.answer: We accept returns within 30 days of purchase for unused products in their original packaging. Please check our full Return Policy page for more details.

settings.question: Are your products cruelty-free?
settings.answer: Yes! All GlamourBeauty products are 100% cruelty-free. We do not test our products or ingredients on animals.

settings.question: How long will shipping take?
settings.answer: Standard shipping usually takes 3-5 business days within the country. Express shipping options are available at checkout.

settings.question: Do you ship internationally?
settings.answer: Currently, we only ship to selected regions. Please refer to our Shipping Policy for a list of countries we ship to.

settings.question: How can I track my order?
settings.answer: Once your order is shipped, you will receive an email with a tracking number and a link to track your package.
